response.global_analysis:
1. Audio-Visual Alignment: Timestamps are highly precise, matching the onset of vocals exactly.
2. Contextual Corrections: The reference JSON contained errors regarding guest performers, listing 'Shirakami Fubuki' for both scenes. Utilizing visual context and on-screen graphics, Scene 1 was corrected to feature Nekomata Okayu (IRyS x OKAYU), and Scene 2 was corrected to feature Fuwamoco (Fuwawa & Mococo Abyssgard).
3. Lyrics & Translation: Jane Doe lyrics by Kenshi Yonezu and Gaze on Me! lyrics were manually corrected and translated to match the spoken Japanese phonetics of the performers. On-screen title cards during instrumental pauses have been subtitled.

subtitles.original: ハー！
JANE DOE
うう...
まるでこの世界で
subtitles.english: It's as if in this world...

subtitles.original: 二人だけみたいだね
なんて少しだけ
subtitles.english: I was just, for a moment...

subtitles.original: 夢を見てしまっただけ
その先に月明かり
花束の香り
指に触れる指
さよなら　もう行かなきゃ
何もかも忘れて
ガラスの上を　裸足のまま歩く
いたむごとに　血が流れて落ちていく
subtitles.english: with every pain, my blood flows and falls.

subtitles.original: お願い　その赤い足跡を
辿って　会いに来て
錆びた道路に放たれていく金魚
subtitles.english: Goldfish released onto a rusted road,

subtitles.original: 靴箱の中　隠したリンゴ
subtitles.english: and an apple hidden inside a shoe locker.

subtitles.original: 萎びた君の肌に残る傷は
subtitles.english: The scars remaining on your withered skin...

subtitles.original: 遠い目のように　泳いだ迷子
subtitles.english: ...are like a distant gaze, swimming like a lost child.

subtitles.original: どこにいるの / ここにいるよ
subtitles.english: Where are you? / I'm right here.

subtitles.original: なにをしてるの / みつめているよ
subtitles.english: What are you doing? / I'm watching you.

subtitles.original: この世を間違いで満たそう
subtitles.english: Let's fill this world with mistakes.

subtitles.original: そばにいてよ
遊びに行こうよ
どこにいるの
ガラスの上を　裸足のまま歩く
いたむごとに　血が流れて落ちていく
subtitles.english: with every pain, my blood flows and falls.

辿って　会いに来て
まるでこの世界で
subtitles.english: It's as if in this world...

subtitles.original: 二人だけみたいだね
なんて少しだけ
subtitles.english: I was just, for a moment...

subtitles.original: 夢を見てしまっただけ
Gaze on Me!
揺らせ一秒　かけたら Summer girls
subtitles.english: Shake it for a second, and we're Summer girls

subtitles.original: 夢の道は　ストレート
subtitles.english: The path of dreams is straight!

subtitles.original: 視線誰にも譲れない
subtitles.english: I won't let anyone else have your gaze!

subtitles.original: Please Gaze on Me!
きっと始まる Fantastic time
subtitles.english: A fantastic time is surely about to begin!

subtitles.original: (La la la la la)
ゴールは Spot light
(La la la la la)
I'm the heroine / (La la la la la)
subtitles.english: I'm the heroine / (La la la la la)

subtitles.original: 君を頂戴
Please Gaze on Me!
きっと始まる Fantastic time
subtitles.english: A fantastic time is surely about to begin!

subtitles.original: みんな準備はいいですか？ Burning
うなずいて陽炎も Heat up
subtitles.english: Nod along, even the heat haze is heating up!

subtitles.original: どうしよう　上昇　明るく...
subtitles.english: What should I do? Soaring, brightly...
